root_cause: The target-season simulation updated latent team and league states immediately after each match in date/team sort order. A later-sorted match on the same calendar date could therefore be evaluated after same-day outcomes had already updated the state, violating the project rule that all same-day predictions must finish before any same-day result update.
required_repair: group target matches by calendar date
generate every baseline and candidate prediction for the date before observing any result from that date
apply all state and league updates only after the full date batch has been predicted
reissue adjudication and second-stage receipts from repaired outputs
policy: All V5.0.0 Bayesian dynamic-state candidate classifications are suspended and may not support promotion, shadow claims or handicap validation until a same-day-safe replay receipt passes. Formal V5 centre remains unchanged.
